name: helios-demo-app
description: Distributed Helios demo with three-node Docker Compose, Blitz NATS streaming, and Binance quote ingestion

scripts.start:node2: bun run src/app.ts --name node2 --tcp-port 5702 --rest-port 8082 --control-port 9092 --peer localhost:5703 --nats-port 4223 --nats-cluster-port 6223 --nats-route nats://127.0.0.1:6224 --expected-cluster-size 3
scripts.start:node1: bun run src/app.ts --name node1 --tcp-port 5701 --rest-port 8081 --control-port 9091 --peer localhost:5702 --peer localhost:5703 --nats-port 4222 --nats-cluster-port 6222 --nats-route nats://127.0.0.1:6223 --nats-route nats://127.0.0.1:6224 --expected-cluster-size 3
